# Game Creator AI

> Game Creator AI is a free, browser-based platform that lets users generate unlimited games using AI. It offers two separate web apps: one for educational learning games (Game Creator Learn) and one for entertainment game prototyping (Game Creator AI). Both support bring-your-own-API (BYOK) or local model execution. No installation, no signup, no cost.

## Apps

- [Game Creator Learn](https://aigamecreatorlearn.netlify.app/): Educational game generator for teachers, tutors, and students. Creates learning games with lesson structure, quizzes, and classroom-ready themes across maths, science, language, and more.
- [Game Creator AI](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/): Entertainment game generator for rapid prototyping. Builds arcade, platformer, shooter, strategy, and other game types with prompt-driven creation.

## Landing Page

- [Home](https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app/landing/): Hub page linking to both apps with feature overview and screenshots.

## Features

- Unlimited game generation — no caps, no quotas
- BYOK (bring your own API key) — connect OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Ollama, LM Studio, or custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints
- Local model support — run with Ollama or LM Studio for fully offline creation
- Prompt-driven workflow — describe the game, get a full spec
- Educational focus — lesson structure, quizzes, classroom-ready themes (Game Creator Learn)
- Entertainment focus — arcade, platformer, shooter, strategy, fine-tune tone, art style, mechanics (Game Creator AI)
- Free to use — both apps are $0

## Support

- [Tip Jar](https://buy.stripe.com/5kQ9AVgCY5dJ77TbIA9R600): Optional donation to support ongoing development.

## Discovery Files

- [robots.txt](https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app/robots.txt): Crawler directives (AI crawlers explicitly allowed)
- [sitemap.xml](https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap
- [sitemap.md](https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app/sitemap.md): Markdown sitemap
- [AGENTS.md](https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app/AGENTS.md): Instructions for coding agents
- [brand.txt](https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app/brand.txt): Brand identity and naming rules
- [ai.json](https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app/ai.json): Structured content map and AI permissions
- [llms-full.txt](https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app/llms-full.txt): Full-text version of this file with complete page content

## Technical

- Tech stack: Vanilla HTML, CSS, JavaScript — no frameworks, no build tools
- Hosting: Netlify static hosting
- Domain: https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app
- No backend, no database, no user accounts
- Both apps run entirely client-side in the browser
